mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_definition (agent_id, name, engine, instruction, model_config, mcp_servers, graph_start, agentscope_pipeline_type, sub_engines, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{name}, #{engine}, #{instruction}, #{modelConfig}, #{mcpServers}, #{graphStart}, #{agentscopePipelineType}, #{subEngines}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, name, engine, instruction, model_config, mcp_servers, graph_start, agentscope_pipeline_type, sub_engines, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_definition WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
SELECT id, agent_id, name, engine, instruction, model_config, mcp_servers, graph_start, agentscope_pipeline_type, sub_engines, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_definition
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_definition SET name = #{name}, engine = #{engine}, instruction = #{instruction}, model_config = #{modelConfig}, mcp_servers = #{mcpServers}, graph_start = #{graphStart}, agentscope_pipeline_type = #{agentscopePipelineType}, sub_engines = #{subEngines}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
